argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const navRes = await fetch('https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav', { credentials: 'include' }); const nav = await navRes.json(); const data = nav?.data ?? {}; if (!data.isLogin) return { error: 'Not logged in' }; const levelInfo = data.level_info ?? {}; return { name: data.uname ?? '', uid: data.mid ?? 0, level: levelInfo.current_level ?? 0, coins: data.money ?? 0, followers: 0, following: 0 }; }
